mapper.insert: INSERT INTO public.login_history ( user_id, login_at, logout_at, login_success_yn, login_ip, user_agent, login_type, fail_reason, session_id, created_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{loginAt}, #{logoutAt}, #{loginSuccessYn}, #{loginIp}, #{userAgent}, #{loginType}, #{failReason}, #{sessionId}, #{createdAt} )
